summary.policy: Production UI must not silently show mock/demo/fallback/sample data. Demo mode must be explicit and disabled in production.

findings.text: throw new Error(`Demo data is disabled for ${feature}. Set VITE_ALLOW_DEMO_DATA=true only in local development.`);
return 'Demo data mode is enabled for local development only. Do not use this data in production.';
// This bridge keeps TypeScript happy and allows emptyRows/demo data to render safely
{isArabic ? 'وضع البيانات التجريبية مفعّل لبيئة غير إنتاجية.' : 'Demo data mode is enabled for a non-production environment.'}
